title: Tony Hoare has died
author: speckx
aiHeadline: Tony Hoare, the man who gave us null references, has passed away, leaving programmers to mourn the bane of their existence.

title: Online age-verification tools for child safety are surveilling adults
author: bilsbie
aiHeadline: Age-verification tools meant to protect kids are now spying on adults, proving that the internet's surveillance is as endless as its supply of cat videos.

title: After outages, Amazon to make senior engineers sign off on AI-assisted changes
author: ndr42
aiHeadline: Amazon, after some major meltdowns, is now making senior engineers approve AI changes, because even geniuses need to double-check when robots are involved.

title: Meta acquires Moltbook
author: mmayberry
aiHeadline: Meta buys Moltbook, a social network for agents, in a desperate bid to stay relevant, because apparently, the future of social media is... more social media.

title: I put my whole life into a single database
author: lukakopajtic
aiHeadline: A man puts his entire life into a single database, proving that some people's lives are as organized as a spreadsheet, and as prone to data breaches as a public Wi-Fi password.
